Explore the Data

Source: vignettes/explore.Rmd
explore.Rmd

These charts are interactive and run entirely in your browser — no R session required. Drag the year slider (or press play) to watch patterns change over time; hover for exact values, and click-drag to zoom. The underlying figures come from the combined incident database (get_comb_inc_dta()), pre-aggregated for use here.

Interactive charts

A 2-D density heat map of ground combat incidents across South Vietnam, 1963–1973, split by initiating side. Use the slider to step through the years.

Enemy incidents by action category — press play or drag the slider to see how the mix of harassment, terrorism, mining, and attacks shifted year to year.

Incidents per month — hover for monthly totals; click-drag to zoom into a period (e.g. the 1968 Tet Offensive).

Want to build these yourself? See the satellite and counts vignettes for the underlying (static) recipes, or grab the data with get_comb_inc_dta().
